sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, text_col VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text_col) VALUES (1, 'testString'), (2, 'example'), (3, 'maxLenValue'), (4, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, num_col DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, num_col) VALUES (1, 5.5), (2, 2.0), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, (lpad(text_col, 10) || ' : ' || (num_col / NULLIF(num_col, 0))) AS result FROM test_strings LEFT JOIN test_numbers ON test_strings.id = test_numbers.id;

SELECT id, lpad(text_col, 6) FROM (SELECT text_col, num_col / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers) AS calc FROM test_strings JOIN test_numbers ON test_strings.id = test_numbers.id GROUP BY text_col, num_col HAVING num_col IS NOT NULL) AS sub_query;
SELECT id, lpad(text_col, 3 + (num_col / 2.0)) AS modified_text FROM test_strings JOIN test_numbers ON test_strings.id = test_numbers.id WHERE num_col > 0;

SELECT lpad(some_text, 15) AS padded_text, (lpad(some_text, 15) / NULLIF(num_col, 0)) AS division_result FROM (SELECT text_col AS some_text, num_col FROM test_strings LEFT JOIN test_numbers ON test_strings.id = test_numbers.id) AS sub_query;
SELECT id, lpad(text_col, 20) AS padded_text FROM test_strings UNION SELECT id, lpad(CAST(num_col AS VARCHAR), 20) FROM test_numbers;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, lpad(text_col, 6) FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table WHERE lpad(text_col, 6) IS NOT NULL;
